name: Superhuman
price_basis: Starter at $25 per user per month with annual billing, checked 2026-07
verdict_reason: KILL: $300 a year for speed on top of Gmail. Zo triages, drafts, and briefs the same inbox at no new cost.
what_zo_builds: Inbox speed without the seat: Zo connects to your Gmail, triages new mail into the split views you define, drafts replies in your voice for the routine threads, surfaces the two or three messages that actually need you, and sends a morning inbox brief. Keyboard shortcuts were never the product; leaving your inbox lighter was.
dont_kill_if: The team features are the point for you: shared conversations, sales integrations, and read statuses across a group of senders. The solo speed upgrade is the version that dies.
build_brief: Goal: cancel Superhuman and get the same inbox velocity from Zo on top of Gmail. Define my split views and triage rules. Set an automation that labels and sorts new mail, drafts replies for routine categories in my voice, and flags the few threads needing a real decision. Add a morning brief listing what arrived, what was handled, and what waits. Run for two weeks against my current flow. Done when I stop opening the paid client and the subscription is canceled.
